master_taxonomy.description: English master taxonomy for the Vision Pipeline Normalizer.

notes: v1 Master-Taxonomien werden additiv zu semantic_release_v1 erweitert.
Projection-Dateien bleiben include-list-kompatibel und koennen schrittweise Semantikmetadaten erhalten.

promotion_slots.label: Document Title
promotion_slots.description: Human-readable document title or subject when available.

promotion_slots.label: Primary Party
promotion_slots.description: Main organization, authority, sender, issuer or counterparty anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Recipient Party
promotion_slots.description: Recipient, addressee or target party named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Person Name
promotion_slots.description: Main natural person, patient, member, employee or profile subject.

promotion_slots.label: Document Identifier
promotion_slots.description: Stable document, account, invoice, contract, membership, asset or customer identifier.

promotion_slots.label: Case Identifier
promotion_slots.description: Case, permit, authority, legal or insurance reference identifier.

promotion_slots.label: Document Date
promotion_slots.description: Primary date printed on or assigned to the document.

promotion_slots.label: Due Date
promotion_slots.description: Payment, response or action due date when available.

promotion_slots.label: Period Start
promotion_slots.description: Start date of the period covered by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Period End
promotion_slots.description: End date of the period covered by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Total Amount
promotion_slots.description: Total, gross or payable monetary amount selected for document-level search and filtering.

promotion_slots.label: Balance Amount
promotion_slots.description: Remaining balance or outstanding amount when available.

promotion_slots.label: Property Address
promotion_slots.description: Property, residence, site or real-estate address anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Site Name
promotion_slots.description: Technical, operational or business site name anchoring the document.

promotion_slots.label: Event Name
promotion_slots.description: Community, personal, schedule or narrative event named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Appointment Date
promotion_slots.description: Health, personal, coaching, pastoral or community appointment date.

promotion_slots.label: Provider Name
promotion_slots.description: Service, health, coaching, care or support provider named by the document.

promotion_slots.label: Tenant Name
promotion_slots.description: Tenant or primary resident named by a housing or property document.

domains.label: Operations
domains.description: Operations, logistics, procurement, and deployment planning.

domains.label: Personal
domains.description: Personal reflection, habits, and development planning.

domains.label: People
domains.description: Identity, personnel files, and personal records.

domains.label: Community
domains.description: Membership, community, donations, and pastoral care.

document_types.label: Invoice
document_types.description: Invoice with a concrete payment request.

document_types.label: Payment Notice
document_types.description: Payment notice without full invoice structure.

document_types.label: Utility Cost Statement
document_types.description: Utility, heating, or service charge statement.

document_types.label: Cost Analysis
document_types.description: Cost or usage analysis without a direct payment request.

document_types.label: Delivery Note
document_types.description: Delivery note or goods receipt document.

document_types.label: Contract Addendum
document_types.description: Amendment or addendum to a contract.

document_types.label: Application
document_types.description: Application or form to be submitted.

document_types.label: Other
document_types.description: Fallback document type for unclear cases.

document_types.label: Narrative Text
document_types.description: Narrative, reflective, or creative text without a strict administrative purpose.

categories.label: Operations
categories.description: Operations, logistics, procurement, and deployment planning.

categories.label: Personal
categories.description: Personal reflection, habits, and development planning.

categories.label: People
categories.description: Identity, personnel files, and personal records.

categories.label: Community
categories.description: Membership, community, donations, and pastoral care.

field_codes.label: Property Manager Name
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Property Manager Name.

field_codes.label: Property Manager Internal ID
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Property Manager Internal ID.

field_codes.label: Service End Date
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Service End Date.

field_codes.label: Personal ID Number
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Personal ID Number.

field_codes.label: Date of Birth
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Date of Birth.

field_codes.label: Place of Birth
field_codes.description: Extracted field for Place of Birth.

row_types.label: Current Cost Breakdown
row_types.description: Row type for Current Cost Breakdown.

row_types.label: Historical Cost Breakdown
row_types.description: Row type for Historical Cost Breakdown.

row_types.label: Meter Reading Series
row_types.description: Row type for Meter Reading Series.

cell_codes.label: Total Building Cost
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Total Building Cost.

cell_codes.label: Total Building Heating Cost
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Total Building Heating Cost.

cell_codes.label: Total Building Hot Water Cost
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Total Building Hot Water Cost.

cell_codes.label: Tenant Cost Share
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Tenant Cost Share.

cell_codes.label: Tenant Heating Cost Share
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Tenant Heating Cost Share.

cell_codes.label: Tenant Hot Water Cost Share
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Tenant Hot Water Cost Share.

cell_codes.label: Total Building Usage
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Total Building Usage.

cell_codes.label: Tenant Usage Share
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Tenant Usage Share.

cell_codes.label: Average Building Usage
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Average Building Usage.

cell_codes.label: Average Tenant Usage
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Average Tenant Usage.

cell_codes.label: Average Usage Unit
cell_codes.description: Cell value for Average Usage Unit.

projection_templates.label: Customer Communication Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for customer-facing service, contract, and account communication without full invoice structure.

routing.when_to_use: Customer letters, account notices, welcome messages, service updates, and provider communication.
routing.avoid_when: Not for full invoices, detailed account statements, housing management, official notices, medical administration, or technical asset documentation.

projection_templates.label: Community and Pastoral Care Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for community, pastoral care, and donation-related records.

routing.when_to_use: Memberships, community events, donations, pastoral care, and spiritual guidance for groups, associations, or congregations.
routing.avoid_when: Not for technical records, formal identity files, medical prescriptions, or property management.

projection_templates.label: Finance Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for general finance, accounting, and business records.

routing.when_to_use: Invoices, statements, payslips, taxes, reimbursements, as well as customer or vendor accounts and budget planning.
routing.avoid_when: Not for rent, utility charges, tenant or property management, technical specifications, identity files, or personal development records.

projection_templates.label: Health and Care Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for medical administration, care, and health-related records.

routing.when_to_use: Medical administration, treatment plans, prescriptions, health insurance, care levels, and medical certificates.
routing.avoid_when: Not for pure identity files, pure financial reimbursements, technical maintenance logs, or community records.

projection_templates.label: Housing and Property Management Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for housing, tenancy, and property management with cost and administration context.

routing.when_to_use: Housing, utility, tenancy, and property management documents with tenant, cost, or authority context.
routing.avoid_when: Not for logistics, procurement, technical execution plans, site access, or personal development plans.

projection_templates.label: Legal and Public Administration Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for legal, authority, and administrative files.

routing.when_to_use: Contracts, notices, permits, registrations, enforcement matters, citizen services, and benefit cases.
routing.avoid_when: Not for utility statements, logistics evidence, pure payroll, or personal reflection journals.

projection_templates.label: Operations and Deployment Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for logistics, procurement, and field-operation records with operational and technical context.

routing.when_to_use: Logistics, procurement, technical execution, deployment planning, travel instructions, access forms, and inventories.
routing.avoid_when: Not for tenancy, utility charges, or property management communication.

projection_templates.label: People Identity Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for identity, employment, and personal proof records.

routing.when_to_use: Identity documents, master records, employment documents, education records, and personal certificates.
routing.avoid_when: Not for financial invoices, technical asset files, medical treatment plans, or community events.

projection_templates.label: Personal Development Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for personal reflection, habit tracking, and development records.

routing.when_to_use: Wellbeing plans, self-reflection, habit logs, coaching support, and everyday personal support.
routing.avoid_when: Not for formal medical administration, finance, legal notices, or membership registers.

projection_templates.label: Personal Development Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for personal reflection, habit tracking, and development records.

routing.when_to_use: Wellbeing plans, self-reflection, habit logs, coaching support, and everyday personal support.
routing.avoid_when: Not for formal medical administration, finance, legal notices, or membership registers.

projection_templates.label: Technical and Asset Management Default v1
projection_templates.description: Default projection for technical, asset-related, and inspection-focused records.

routing.when_to_use: Specifications, inspections, maintenance, asset or site documentation, engineering changes, quality assurance, and equipment files.
routing.avoid_when: Not for property management, pure financial records, formal identity files, or pastoral and wellbeing-related records.

warnings: Es existiert noch keine Projection-Komposition ueber extends.
recommendations: Projection files should actively use extends and compatibility metadata.
Promotion rules should remain explicitly versioned per projection.
New domains should grow through projection families instead of special-purpose paths.
